ast.name: log
ast.source: No GitHub repository specified in settings. Fetching all repositories.
ast.target: 设置中未指定 GitHub 仓库。正在获取所有仓库。

ast.name: log
ast.target: 已从 GitHub 获取议题

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: File path to a CSV file that provides a title for each issue
ast.target: 提供每个议题标题的 CSV 文件路径

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: List relevant repositories here to increase startup speed as only issue IDs of these repositories are fetched. Specify the repositories comma-separated.
ast.target: 在此处列出相关仓库以提高启动速度，因为仅获取这些仓库的议题 ID。请以逗号分隔指定仓库。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Issue IDs without repository prefix (e.g. #123 instead my-repo#123) are associated with this repository
ast.target: 不带仓库前缀的议题 ID（例如 #123 而非 my-repo#123）将关联到此仓库

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: GitHub token for retrieving issue titles
ast.target: 用于检索议题标题的 GitHub 令牌

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 议题 ID 到标题的映射

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 议题 ID 的 URL 前缀

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 默认 GitHub 仓库（可选）

ast.name: warn
ast.target: [before-after-hook]：\"Hook()\" 用途变更警告，请使用 \"Hook.Collection()\"。了解更多：https://git.io/upgrade-before-after-hook-to-1.4

ast.name: warn
ast.source: No GitHub repository owner specified in settings
ast.target: 设置中未指定 GitHub 仓库所有者

ast.name: warn
ast.source: No GitHub issue title map file specified in settings
ast.target: 设置中未指定 GitHub 议题标题映射文件
